gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/163)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/163)

parts.text: مُوسَى بْنِ بَكْرٍقَالَ كَانَ أَبُو الْحَسَنِ الْأَوَّلُ ( عليه السلام )

text: كَثِيراً مَا يَأْكُلُ السُّكَّرَ عِنْدَ النَّوْمِ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Ali Bin Hassan, from Musa Bin Bakr who said,
‘Abu Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup> the 1st used to frequently eat the sugar at sleep time’.
en.sarwar: 1. A number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad from Ali ibn Hassan from Musa ibn Bakr who has said the following: “Abu al-Hassan, al-Awwal would eat sugar very often when going to sleep.’”
